equipmentMods.amulet: Gain additional 2% damage bonus for each extra inventory slot
equipmentMods.belt: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.goblet: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Fire Orbs: Once the Orb finishes charging, it explodes emitting a wave of Fire dealing 100% damage + 20% more damage for every extra second it charged.
equipmentMods.goblet: Fire Orbs: Orbs now charge for additonal 2 seconds.
equipmentMods.trinket: Fire Orbs: Each orb launches two mini-orbs at your targets, dealing 50% damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.horn: Статический Заряд: Получает заряды нанося урон противникам. Каждый заряд даёт +1% к урону Молнией. При достижении 100 зарядов призывает молнии на поле боя.
equipmentMods.relic: Когда вы убиваете Повелителя Разлома все другие активные участники братства получают усиление Благословения урона.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
